course_history_year_range_note: Royal Birkdale last hosted in 2017 (Jordan Spieth wins). Fallback to all event_id=100 history. Years at Royal Birkdale: 1998, 2008, 2017.
course_history_note: The Open Championship rotates courses. Royal Birkdale hosted 1998, 2008, 2017. Apollo should filter by course key 541 (Birkdale) or use all event_id=100 history with course_name filter.
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale. MAJOR event. Expand field to 156 players.

sg_weights._note: Royal Birkdale (154th Open, tuned by Claude 2026-07-15 from course research): APP premium (par-70, four par 3s incl. new 241y 15th, firm/fast greens demanding distance control); OTT accuracy-weighted (flat valley fairways between dunes, willow scrub + revetted pots, re-bunkered 18th) — note our SG:OTT input blends accuracy+distance, so bump kept moderate; ARG up for links scrambling/runoffs; PUTT neutral (docile greens by Open standards). Weather: benign (8-14mph, firm/fast, EAST wind early — opposite prevailing) → wind less of a separator, precision more.

course_weight_override._note: Standard weights. Royal Birkdale 2017 history available — if coverage >50% consider raising to 0.25/0.20.

course_notes: Royal Birkdale, Southport — par 70, 7,223y, 154th Open (11th at Birkdale). "Fairest test on the rota": flat valley fairways between dunes, docile greens, revetted pot bunkers, dense willow scrub. Changes since 2017: new 241y par-3 15th, re-bunkered 18th tee shot, reworked 5th/7th/14th. 2026 forecast is BENIGN — sunny, 8-14mph, firm/fast ("baked-out") with an EAST wind early (opposite prevailing) → expect lower scoring than a typical Open and precision over wind-game as the separator.
winner_archetype: Precision iron player with accurate (not necessarily long) driving and links pedigree. Birkdale winners: Spieth 2017 (wire-to-wire, -12), Harrington 2008, O'Meara 1998, Baker-Finch 1991, Watson 1983 — precision players, rarely bombers. The fairest links on the rota lets the best total game win: elite SG:APP + bogey avoidance + scrambling. Firm/fast + benign wind favours distance control over trajectory battling.

major_flags.contrarian_weight_note: Consider reducing contrarian from 0.05 to 0.01 for majors (chalk often wins links Opens)
major_flags.ceiling_boost: Per week-15 suggestion, ceiling from 0.05→0.08 at majors
